name: Formula One 2010
attribution: Historical data derived from f1db (github.com/f1db/f1db, CC BY 4.0)
AI ratings, reliability, car scalars and selector data by AFry, shipped with LadyCroussette's F1 2010 Skinpack for Formula V8 Gen 3 260627

skinPacks.name: F1 2010 Skinpack for Formula V8 Gen 3 260627 (LadyCroussette)

notes: Source release: https://www.overtake.gg/downloads/f1-2010-skinpack-for-formula-v8-gen-3.81401/, LadyCroussette's F1 2010 Skinpack for Formula V8 Gen 3 260627, with Custom-AI and selector data credited to AFry.

Source archive SHA-256 4CBA68519B37A97677D2B23A0E800E1B12CACB1AF25DF5B3B5840BAB43A835FC; Realistic F-Reiza.xml SHA-256 DBD7C5953C72F39D3B41C8022FF2F7599F3F349C4C3D4260750F38720ECB8BBE; source generic pointer SHA-256 4483C08D566A00473FEC5374102F79EF4E0D25C95C242FAC68A0CB6A4E197FE8; whitespace-normalized committed pointer SHA-256 19CB989ED8D293A8197255F16EF9D4CE62305181A792EE70621F12A58E7C81AD.

All 27 real 2010 race drivers are represented by 28 entries. Sakon Yamamoto uses Hispania #21 at round 10 and #20 at rounds 11-14 and 16-17; his canonical season baseline is the longer-lived #20 source profile, with the complete #21 profile plus its Silverstone patch applied at round 10.

Nine fictional what-if source profiles are excluded. The real starter grid is retained round by round: Trulli (R2), de la Rosa (R3), Glock (R4), Kovalainen (R5), and di Grassi (R16) remain DNS rather than being backfilled.

The source Custom-AI's 13 venue groups produce 309 active-livery, starter-filtered per-round patches. Explicit Sakhir, Melbourne, and Yas Marina aliases preserve the source data at placeholder tracks.

Selector change points: R1 Bahrain, R2 Australia, R3 Malaysia, R4 China, R5 Spain, R7 Turkey, R8 Canada, R10 Britain, R11 Germany, R13 Belgium, R14 Italy, R15 Singapore, R16 Japan, R18 Brazil, and R19 Abu Dhabi.

Source defect: the installed R15/R16/R18/R19 variant pointers refer to absent Sauber_visor_Heidfeld.dds; those external files require Sauber_visor.dds until the upstream skinpack is corrected. The repo-owned generic pointer is internally complete.

Placeholder venues (isPlaceholder=true): Bahrain, Albert Park, Sepang, Shanghai, Istanbul, Valencia, Marina Bay, Korea, and Yas Marina. Lap counts preserve the real race distance on each stand-in. Valencia and Marina Bay retain documented no-alternate street-circuit gaps.
